attributes.title: Sparrow WiFi — SSID × Channel Signal Matrix
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow WiFi — SSID × Channel Signal Matrix", "type": "heatmap", "params": {"type": "heatmap", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "enableHover": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "colorsNumber": 8, "colorSchema": "Reds", "setColorRange": false, "colorsRange": [], "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "valueAxes": [{"show": true, "id": "ValueAxis-1", "type": "value", "scale": {"type": "linear", "defaultYExtents": false}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "overwriteColor": false, "color": "black"}}]}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "signal.strength_dbm", "customLabel": "Max signal (dBm)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "wifi.channel.occupied_set", "interval": 1, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}, "customLabel": "Channel"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "wifi.ssid", "size": 100, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "SSID"}}]}
